delivery-returns.title: Delivery & Returns
delivery-returns.body:
Delivery

UK delivery is complimentary on every order. Orders are dispatched within 2 working days and typically arrive within 3–5 working days of dispatch. You will receive an email when your order ships, and you can follow it at any time on our order tracking page using your order number and email address.

We currently ship within the United Kingdom. For international orders, write to us first — small-batch tea deserves a plan, not an apology.

Returns

Under the Consumer Contracts Regulations you may cancel your order within 14 days of receiving it, without giving a reason. Because tea is a foodstuff, we can only accept returns of unopened caddies and gift boxes with their seals intact.

To start a return, reply to your order confirmation email quoting your order number. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 14 days of us receiving the return. Return postage is your responsibility unless the item arrived damaged or incorrect — in which case we make it right, at our cost, without drama.

Damaged or incorrect orders

If anything arrives less than perfect, email us within 48 hours with a photograph and your order number. We will replace or refund it — your choice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Mt. Peak respects your privacy. This policy explains what we collect, why, and what we never do.

What we collect

Account details — your name, email address and a securely hashed password (we cannot read your password). Order details — the items you buy, your delivery and billing addresses, gift messages, and any promo code used. Newsletter — your email address, if you subscribe.

How we use it

To fulfil and deliver your orders, to send transactional emails about them (confirmations, dispatch notices), to let you sign in and see your order history, and — only if you subscribed — to send occasional news from the mountain. We never sell or rent your data to anyone.

Payments

Card payments are processed by Stripe; your card number never touches our servers. Stripe's privacy policy applies to the payment step.

Cookies

We use a single, essential session cookie to keep you signed in. No advertising trackers, no third-party analytics cookies.

Your rights

You may request a copy of your data, correction, or deletion at any time by emailing us. Unsubscribing from the newsletter takes one email. We keep order records as long as tax law requires, then delete them.

terms.title: Terms of Sale
terms.body:
These terms govern purchases from Mt. Peak. Placing an order means you accept them — they are short, fair, and written to be read.

Orders & payment

All prices are in pounds sterling and include VAT where applicable. An order is accepted when we email your confirmation. Until payment is live, orders may be recorded as reservations and a payment link will follow by email. We reserve the right to cancel and refund any order we cannot fulfil — sold-out harvests happen; we will always tell you promptly.

Promo codes

One code per order. Codes have no cash value, may be limited in number or time, and can be withdrawn at any time. Abuse of promotional codes voids the discount.

Delivery & risk

Risk in the goods passes to you on delivery. Ownership passes when payment clears. Our full delivery and returns terms are set out on the Delivery & Returns page and form part of these terms.

The product

Tea is a natural, seasonal product. Harvests vary — that is the point. Imagery is representative; leaf and liquor will vary batch to batch within the character described.

Liability

Nothing in these terms limits liability that cannot lawfully be limited. Otherwise our total liability for any order is limited to the amount you paid for it.

Contact

Mt. Peak · Eastern Nepal sourcing, UK fulfilment. Questions: reply to any of our emails and a human answers.
